input.background: Identify which of these statements are true and which are false.
input.question: If r is close to zero, X and Y are not related in a linear way.

X.description: A numerical variable representing one of the two variables whose linear relationship with Y is being analyzed.

Y.description: A numerical variable representing one of the two variables whose linear relationship with X is being analyzed.

r.description: The correlation coefficient indicating the strength and direction of the linear relationship between X and Y.
